  1. Home
  2. Credentials and Safety

Verified credentials. Clear expectations.

Trust should come from current credentials, a written scope, honest limits, and a practical plan for the property—not from inflated claims.

Request a free estimate Call (540) 388-8715

Verified public credentials

ISA member and ISA Certified Arborist

Angel Tree Services publicly identifies an active ISA membership and an ISA Certified Arborist credential. Certification belongs to the credentialed individual; it does not imply that every employee holds the same credential.

The company also states 30+ years of industry experience. No additional qualification should be inferred from these badges.

Before work begins

What customers should expect to clarify

01

The recommended scope

The written proposal should identify the work being recommended and the property areas involved.

02

Site access and surroundings

Structures, fences, drives, utilities, neighboring property, ground conditions, and access can affect the work plan.

03

Cleanup and next steps

Cleanup, debris or wood handling, stump work, scheduling, and follow-up should be confirmed in the approved scope.

Safety around urgent conditions

Power lines require the utility.

Never approach a fallen or contacted power line. Keep people and pets away and contact 911 or the electric utility as appropriate. Angel Tree Services does not represent itself as a provider of energized-line work.

Need current documentation?

If a property manager or organization requires insurance or other documentation, request it through the office. Current availability can be confirmed directly without publishing private documents or unsupported blanket claims.

Email the office

A clear scope is part of a safer start.

Tell us about the property, service, and site concerns so the estimate can begin with the right context.

Request a free estimate Call (540) 388-8715
